message.thinking:
We need to evaluate the given final section of thesis introduction (in Latvian). The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis?
2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section.
3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text?

We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, each with keys: question (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), feedback (string), complies (boolean). Provide only that array, no other text.

We need to analyze the text. The text is an introduction section, not listing chapters. It doesn't list main sections. So question 1: No. Feedback: It doesn't list main sections. Complies false.

Question 2: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? The text does not describe contents of each section; it's just introduction. So false. Feedback: It doesn't describe contents of sections. Complies false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Since it doesn't mention structure, can't. So false. Feedback: No structure indicated. Complies false.

Thus all three false. Provide JSON array accordingly.
